texto: Primum non nocere, 'First, don't make things worse,' was an essential principle of Hippocrates' medicine. Nowadays, unfortunately, it seems to have been forgotten. Conventional modern medicine aims at getting rid of patients' symptoms. Little, if any consideration is given to the fact that some of these symptoms may actually be used by the body in an attempt to correct deeper disorders. When this is the case, suppressing the symptom does not necessarily help the patient.
explicacao: Citação de Samuel Sagan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Primum non nocere, 'First, don't make things worse,' was an essential principle of Hippocrates' m…” articula reflexao, medicine, symptoms em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: In the preshent human condition, pain is unavoidable. As long as you inhabit a physical body, you have to experience pain from time to time. Suffering is of a different nature. It is a reaction of the manas/mind that magnifies the pain and adds various emotional frills and thrills to it. In many cases, pain is only transient; but if one wishes, one can always add to it and suffer more - there is no limit.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samuel Sagan sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “In the preshent human condition, pain is unavoidable. As long as you inhabit a physical body, you…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, pain, suffering, útil em momentos de suffering.

texto: While performing the great majority of the actions in their life, people are totally unaware. We tend to go through our daily activities mechanically. We talk without real purpose. We do things without even knowing that we do them. We are not really present to what we are doing. Even if we practise being aware, entire portions of our days can elapse before we retrieve our thread of awareness. In short, we are not living our life, we are sleeping it.
explicacao: Citação de Samuel Sagan sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “While performing the great majority of the actions in their life, people are totally unaware. We …” articula vida, awareness, without em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e vida.
